ee:variables.ee:set-variable: %dw 2.0 output application/java --- (payload.Transactions[0].DataElements flatMap ((de) -> de.Rows flatMap ((r) -> r.Edits)) filter ((e) -> e.Name == "po_no") map ((e) -> e.Value))[0] default ""

raise-error.description: P21 Number Not present in Coupa Payload
PO Number is already Available in P21 System
